title: rosa tomentella var. obtusifolia
intro: Rosa tomentella var. obtusifolia, also known as the 'tomentose rose', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its antispasmodic and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa tomentella var. obtusifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and aid in the treatment of various gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Rosa tomentella var. obtusifolia typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of ointments or salves.
